prompt: Implement sparse_storage(dense_elements, density, value_bytes, metadata_bits). Use ceil(dense_elements*density) stored nonzeros. Return nonzeros, data_bytes, metadata_bytes rounded up from bits, total_bytes, and compression_ratio (dense value bytes divided by sparse total bytes). For an empty sparse encoding return infinity as the ratio. Validate all inputs.
instruction: Implement sparse_storage(dense_elements, density, value_bytes, metadata_bits). Use ceil(dense_elements*density) stored nonzeros.
